title: Ultimate Mechanic GUI pack(OLD)
description: Modify the GUI in the game to give it a unique style and provide you with an immersive experience.
body:
![Ultimate Mechanic GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41deb05fdd64948755424a101e8fa849e15f882e.png)
-
**Modify the GUI in the game to give it a unique style and provide you with an immersive experience.**

### **_Just keep in mind:_**

- **_Make sure to credit, and don't claim Mechanical Equation GUI as your own creation._**
- **_You may create or edit assets in the pack for compatibility with other mod's UIs._**
 - _**This resource pack is no longer updated and has a relatively low completion rate. If you like this style, you can check out [Gloom Gear](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gloom-gear).**_
